question_text: A distance-time graph shows a straight line that is gradually getting less steep over time. What does this tell us about the object's speed?

options.label: B
options.text: The object is moving at a constant speed

explanation: On a distance-time graph, a less steep line means less distance is covered in the same time interval, so the speed is decreasing. A line that gradually becomes less steep shows the object is slowing down.
